summary:
Phase 3A (Templates + Streak + Settings) frontend testing on Expo web preview at mobile viewport 390x844. 6 of 7 review-request features PASS; 1 CRITICAL bug found in 'Clear all data'. Verified: (1) Home settings-gear navigates to settings-screen; add-template-chip always visible. (2) Add Template flow opens add-template-screen; save-template-button has aria-disabled=true when amount=0 or name empty, becomes enabled after tcalc-key-1/5/0 + name 'Coffee'; saving returns to Home and a template-<id> chip appears showing 'Coffee ₹150 · UPI'. (3) One-tap log: tapping the Coffee chip created an expense at top of Recent (-₹150 'Just now'), green-toast displayed '✓ Coffee logged' for 2s, and month-total increased from $3,248 → $3,398 (USD because earlier currency change). (4) Template limit: created 5 templates (T1..T5); the 6th Save tap inside add-template-screen rendered pro-modal containing 'Unlimited quick-add templates'; both pro-cta and pro-maybe-later dismiss it; chip count stayed at 5. (5) Settings Profile: edit-name → name-edit-input → confirm-name updated greeting from default to 'Alex'; open-currency → settings-currency-USD → Home now shows $ symbol (THIS MONTH '$3,248'). (6) Settings switches app-lock-switch / notifications-switch / sms-switch toggled, navigated to Home and back, and values persisted (aria-checked retained). (7) Settings Data: export-csv tap did not crash on web (Share is a no-op as expected). open-privacy → 'Your Privacy' modal with privacy-got-it dismiss works. Version row reads '1.0.0'. Long-press on a template chip opens the bottom-sheet menu and delete-template removes the chip. Regression: Home hero/chart/recent intact; Groups + Insights tabs still load (groups-screen, insights-screen).

CRITICAL BUG: Settings clear-data button is a no-op on web preview — react-native Alert.alert() (multi-button) is not rendered by react-native-web, so the 'Delete Everything' destructive callback never fires, resetAllData() is not invoked, and the app does not navigate to onboarding-screen. Verified by both browser dialog listener (zero dialogs fired) and DOM probe (no 'Delete Everything' element present). User has no way to clear data from the web preview.

Non-blocking carry-over warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (react-native-web); 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' from add-expense.tsx — both noted in iteration_3 and still present.

ui_bugs.issue: On web, tapping clear-data does nothing — react-native-web does not render Alert.alert() with multiple buttons, so the Delete Everything onPress never fires, resetAllData() is never called, and the app never navigates to onboarding. Reference: /app/frontend/app/settings.tsx:111-127.

react_native_issues.issue: Line 363 declares `const ICON: IoniconName = "person-outline";` but `IoniconName` is never imported. Babel strips types at runtime so the bundle still works, but tsc/IDE/strict CI will fail. Remove the two dead lines (363-364) or import the proper type from '@expo/vector-icons'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/settings.tsx:363.
Console warning persists: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking. Reference: /app/frontend/app/add-expense.tsx.
Console warning persists: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Web-only deprecation; non-blocking.

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Replace Alert.alert() in /app/frontend/app/settings.tsx (clearAll) with a cross-platform confirm. Two options: (a) use Platform.OS === 'web' ? window.confirm(...) : Alert.alert(...) and gate the destructive branch on the truthy result; or (b) render a custom RN Modal styled like the Pro modal with Cancel + Delete Everything buttons. After fix, retest that web tap on clear-data → confirms → resetAllData() runs → router.replace('/onboarding') reaches onboarding-screen.
Remove stray type annotation in /app/frontend/app/settings.tsx:363-364 (`const ICON: IoniconName = ...; void ICON;`) — `IoniconName` is not imported and the lines are dead code.
(Optional, carry-over) Replace deprecated `pointerEvents` prop with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` in add-expense.tsx.
(Optional, carry-over) Migrate `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` for web.
critical_code_review_comments: settings.tsx uses React Native Alert.alert for the destructive Clear-all-data flow, which is silently ignored on react-native-web. Cross-platform confirm needed (see action_items).
settings.tsx line 363 leaves dead `const ICON: IoniconName = 'person-outline'; void ICON;` — `IoniconName` type is not imported, would fail TypeScript strict build.

templates.ts addTemplate returns boolean but does not surface why it failed (limit reached vs storage error). Currently OK because caller assumes only the limit case, but a small error type would be cleaner.
Home index.tsx logTemplate calls updateStreak() then load() — load() also calls getStreak(); minor race but state ends consistent. No fix needed.

success_rate.frontend: 6/7 review-request features pass (~86%); 1 critical bug on web (Clear all data)

seed_data_creation: None new. Relied on db.ts first-launch seed (Zomato ₹349 / Petrol ₹800 / Netflix ₹649 / Metro ₹200 / DMart ₹1,250). Templates and Coffee expense were created within each fresh session for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3A verified end-to-end on web except Clear-all-data. localStorage clears between browser sessions, so to re-test the template limit recreate 5 templates within one session. After main agent fixes settings.tsx clearAll for web, retest: open /settings → tap clear-data → accept confirm → expect onboarding-screen and rupeelog_templates / expenses cleared from localStorage. testIDs exercised: home-screen, settings-gear, settings-screen, edit-name, name-edit-input, confirm-name, open-currency, settings-currency-USD, app-lock-switch, notifications-switch, sms-switch, export-csv, clear-data, open-privacy, privacy-got-it, add-template-chip, add-template-screen, tcalc-key-*, template-name-input, save-template-button, template-<id>, delete-template, green-toast, pro-modal, pro-cta, pro-maybe-later. Note that on the very first session the streak indicator is hidden (currentStreak=1 after first updateStreak()), which matches the spec.
rca_of_issue: Clear-all-data bug RCA: settings.tsx clearAll() calls React Native's Alert.alert(title, msg, [Cancel, Delete Everything]). On native iOS/Android this renders the system alert and invokes onPress. On react-native-web, Alert.alert with multiple buttons is not implemented (the polyfill only handles single-button alerts by calling window.alert, and multi-button calls silently no-op). Result on web: no dialog appears, the destructive onPress never fires, resetAllData() is not invoked, and router.replace('/onboarding') is never called. Reproduction: open /settings on web, tap clear-data — UI does not change, no DOM modal is rendered, page.on('dialog') receives zero events. Mitigation: branch on Platform.OS === 'web' and use window.confirm(...), or render a custom RN Modal for the confirm UI consistently on both platforms.
